sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91207" key="ptistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτισ-τικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fitted for winnowing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πτιστικὸν τερετίζειν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
